meaning: n.可理解性,可理解之事物
examples: It may include minor lapses, or minor difficulties with pronunciation or intonation patterns, which do not affect overall intelligibility.
The LFS project aims to remedy the problem of limited system-level intelligibility on Linux.
He is resolutely relaxed about usage, understanding that correctitude and intelligibility are not the same.
The resulting product portfolio is expected to set new standards for sound quality, clarity and speech intelligibility.
Combining these methods of sound delivery is expected to result in unparalleled sound quality and speech intelligibility.
